verses.text: “Mite kikalah thu kineihna om a, thukhen zumah amaute pai-in, thukhente in amau' thu khensakin, a dikpa khahin a mawhpa lelsak a
a mawhpa satna thuak dinga kilawm ahih leh, thukhenpa in amah lumsuk sakin a khialhna zahin ama muhin satsak ding hi
Sat sawmli kipia thei ding a, ahih hangin tua val hilo ding hi. Tua hi kei leh, hih sangin a tamvei zaw mi khat in sat lai leh note' muhna-ah na sanggampa uh a kineubawl suak ding hi
“Bawng in an a cil laitakin a muk na tuam kei ding uh hi.

“Sanggam pasalte teng khawmin, tuate khat si-in tapa a neih kei leh, a sipa' zi pen innkuan pualam khualmi tawh kitenglo ding hi. A pasal' sanggampa in luppihin a zi dingin amah la ding a, ama tungah pasal' sanggampa' nasep sem ding hi
Ama min Israel tungah a maiman' lohna dingin tuanu in a neih masak a tapa pen a sisa a pasal' ta-in kiseh ding hi

Mipa in a sanggampa' zi a laknop kei leh, upate kiang kongpi-ah a sanggampa' zi pai ding a, ‘Ka pasal' sanggampa in a sanggampa' min Israel sungah a zop ding utlo a, pasal' sanggampa' nasep kei tungah hong sem nuamlo hi,’ ci ding hi
Tua ciangin mipa' khuapi upate in amah samin thu genpih ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Tuanu ka la nuam kei hi,’ a cih teitei leh

upate' omin a sanggampa' zi ama kiangah paito-in a khe panin a khedap kaihkhiat sakin a maitang cilphih ding hi. Tua ciangin tuanu in, ‘A sanggampa' innkuan a zomtolo mipa hih bangin kibawl ta hen,’ cikhia ding hi
Israel mite lakah ama innkuan pen, ‘A khedap a kikaih khiatsak mipa' innkuan,’ kici ding hi.
“Mi khatlekhat a kilai ciangin, a satpa' kiang panin a pasal a honkhia dingin a khatpa' zi hong pai a, a khutin a selsimte a matsak leh
tuanu' khut na sattansak ding uh a, amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi
“Na ipsung uhah tawisuang nam nih, a lian leh a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi
Na innsung uhah tehna nam nih, a lian leh a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi
Tawisuang a cing a man na nei ding uh a, tehna a cing a man na nei ding uh hi. Topa note' Pasian in hong piak leitangah na khan' uh a sau theihna ding ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangin gamta-in, a thuman lote khempeuh, Topa note' Pasian' tungah a kihhuai ahi hi.
“Egypt panin nong paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah Amalek mite in note hong bawlna
note gimin lungkhamin na om laitakun lampi-ah a hong simna, leh note' nungah a nunung khempeuh hong thahna uh phawk un; amaute in Pasian kihtalo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa note' Pasian in note' neih dingin gamh-in hong piak leitang tungah, Topa na Pasian un na kiim uha na galte khempeuh panun tawlngakna hong piak ciangin, mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite a kiphawkna na phiatkhiat ding uh na mangngilh kei ding uh hi.
